status.description: Lifecycle phase. alpha=early/breaking-likely, beta=feature-complete/polishing, stable=production-ready, deprecated=slated for removal

since.description: Semver version when component was added

deprecatedSince.description: Semver version when component was deprecated (only when status=deprecated)

replacedBy.description: Name of replacement component (only when status=deprecated)

removalTarget.description: Target semver for removal (only when status=deprecated)

notes.description: Free-form context for status (esp. for alpha/beta gotchas)
